headline: 5X Lamar, 4X Money Laundering, free Higgins Helitours
quickTake: Best casual grind: Lamar Contact Missions at 5X
Best business grind: Money Laundering Missions at 4X
Best simple objective: 3 Hands On Car Wash Legal Missions for GTA$100,000
Best free claim: Higgins Helitours, if eligible

beginnerPath.label: Run Lamar Contact Missions first. 5X is the easiest low-setup money this week.
If you own or can afford Hands On Car Wash, complete 3 Legal Missions for the GTA$100,000 challenge.
Do not waste early money on random discounted vehicles.
Save toward practical money tools: Kosatka, Agency, Acid Lab, Nightclub, or businesses that unlock better weekly bonuses.
If you already own Hands On Car Wash, claim Higgins Helitours while it is free.

locations.name: Start from your phone
locations.note: Call Lamar or use the Jobs menu. No property required.

locations.name: Hands On Car Wash
locations.note: Start Legal Missions from the property. 3 missions = GTA$100,000.

locations.name: Maze Bank Foreclosures (in-game site)
locations.note: Free this week if you own Hands On Car Wash. Claim via the in-game browser.

locations.name: The Diamond Casino & Resort
locations.note: Spin the Lucky Wheel once per day.

locations.name: LS Car Meet
locations.note: Place Top 2 in the LS Car Meet Series for 2 days in a row.

locations.name: Gun Van (rotating spot)
locations.note: Marked with a van icon on the map once you get close or check daily.

locations.name: Vinewood Hills
locations.note: Purple stopwatch icon on the map.

locations.name: Route 68
locations.note: Enter via the yellow race corona or Quick Job menu.
